name: Stir-Fried Asian Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and press firm tofu for 30 minutes.
2. Grate the zest of half a tangerine or lemon.
3. Combine 2 tablespoons orange juice, salt, pepper, hoisin sauce, rice wine vinegar, low sodium soy sauce, sugar, cornstarch, vegetable oil, sesame oil, minced garlic, ginger, sliced mushrooms, and broccoli florets (3/4-inch).
4. Heat the oils in a skillet until very hot.
5. Add garlic and ginger; stir-fry for 10 seconds.
6. Add mushrooms and broccoli with some water; cover and steam for 2 minutes or until tender.
7. Add tofu.
8. Stir hoisin sauce to recombine cornstarch; add to the skillet.
9. Cover and simmer for 30-60 seconds to thicken.
10. Season with salt and crushed red pepper.
Yield: 2 servings
